tasks.description: Implement WriteBatch.RollbackToSavePoint using Copy-on-SavePoint approach. Design doc: design_docs/additional_impl/08_writebatch_savepoint.md. Use Pebble's batch Repr()/SetRepr() to snapshot and restore batch state at save points. Add PopSavePoint() to WriteBatch interface. Modify internal/engine/rocks/engine.go and internal/engine/traits/traits.go.
acceptance_criteria: SetSavePoint() captures batch state via Pebble Repr()
RollbackToSavePoint() restores batch state from saved snapshot
Nested save points work correctly (stack-based)
PopSavePoint() added to WriteBatch interface
Unit tests pass: save/rollback, nested save points, empty batch rollback
go build succeeds with no errors
go test ./internal/engine/... passes

tasks.description: Implement Raw KV API (RawGet, RawPut, RawDelete, RawScan, RawBatchGet, RawBatchPut). Design doc: design_docs/additional_impl/11_raw_kv_api.md. Create RawStorage type bypassing MVCC, add gRPC handlers to tikvService. Supports both standalone and cluster modes.
acceptance_criteria: RawStorage type created in internal/server/raw_storage.go
RawGet, RawPut, RawDelete, RawScan gRPC handlers implemented on tikvService
RawBatchGet, RawBatchPut handlers implemented
Raw operations bypass MVCC layer, use CF_DEFAULT directly
Standalone mode writes directly to engine
Unit tests pass for all Raw* operations
go build succeeds
go test ./internal/server/... passes

tasks.description: Implement CLI improvements: region command, enhanced dump with MVCC decoding, actual Pebble compaction. Design doc: design_docs/additional_impl/09_cli_improvements.md. Add cmdRegion() scanning CF_RAFT, add --decode flag to dump, replace SyncWAL with Pebble Compact().
acceptance_criteria: region command implemented: scans CF_RAFT for RegionStateKey entries
region --id <id> shows specific region metadata
region --all lists all regions
dump --decode flag decodes MVCC keys and Write/Lock records
compact command calls Pebble Compact() instead of SyncWAL
CompactCF() and CompactAll() methods added to rocks.Engine
Unit tests pass for all three improvements
go build succeeds
go test ./cmd/gookvs-ctl/... passes

tasks.description: Implement MVCC Scanner for efficient range queries. Design doc: design_docs/additional_impl/06_mvcc_scanner.md. Create Scanner struct in internal/storage/mvcc/ with forward/backward scan, lock checking, version visibility, key deduplication. Replace ad-hoc Scan() in server/storage.go.
acceptance_criteria: Scanner struct created in internal/storage/mvcc/scanner.go
ScannerConfig with ts, isolation level, key range, limit, reverse flag
Forward scan iterates CF_WRITE in descending commitTS order per user key
Lock checking for SI isolation (returns ErrKeyIsLocked)
Key deduplication: returns only latest visible version per user key
Value retrieval from short value or CF_DEFAULT
ScanStatistics tracks scanned keys and bytes
server/storage.go Scan() refactored to use Scanner
Unit tests pass: basic scan, reverse scan, lock detection, version filtering
go build succeeds
go test ./internal/storage/mvcc/... passes

tasks.description: Implement Raft log compaction (GC/truncation). Design doc: design_docs/additional_impl/03_raft_log_compaction.md. Handle PeerTickRaftLogGC tick, add CompactLog proposal through Raft, implement apply-side truncation, add background physical deletion.
acceptance_criteria: PeerTickRaftLogGC handled in peer.go handleMessage()
Log GC tick evaluates threshold (count and size based)
CompactLog admin command proposed through Raft
Apply side advances TruncatedIndex in ApplyState
Background worker deletes old log entries via DeleteRange on CF_RAFT
Config fields: raft-log-gc-threshold, raft-log-gc-count-limit consumed
Unit tests pass for tick evaluation and truncation
go build succeeds
go test ./internal/raftstore/... passes

tasks.description: Wire pessimistic lock, ResolveLock, TxnHeartBeat, async commit, and 1PC into gRPC endpoints. Design doc: design_docs/additional_impl/07_rpc_wiring.md. Add KvPessimisticLock, KvPessimisticRollback, KvResolveLock, KvTxnHeartBeat handlers. Modify KvPrewrite to support async commit and 1PC paths.
acceptance_criteria: KvPessimisticLock gRPC handler calls AcquirePessimisticLock
KvPessimisticRollback gRPC handler calls PessimisticRollback
KvResolveLock gRPC handler resolves all locks for a transaction
KvTxnHeartBeat gRPC handler extends lock TTL
KvPrewrite checks use_async_commit flag and calls PrewriteAsyncCommit
KvPrewrite checks try_one_pc flag and calls PrewriteAndCommit1PC
Storage methods added: PessimisticLock, ResolveLock, TxnHeartBeat
BatchCommands routing updated for new RPCs
Unit tests pass for all new handlers
go build succeeds
go test ./internal/server/... passes

tasks.description: Implement TxnScheduler command dispatcher. Design doc: design_docs/additional_impl/05_txn_scheduler.md. Create TxnScheduler with command queue, worker pool, latch integration. Replace direct action calls in Storage with scheduler dispatch.
acceptance_criteria: TxnScheduler struct with worker goroutine pool
Command interface with concrete types: PrewriteCmd, CommitCmd, RollbackCmd, etc.
Worker pool size driven by SchedulerConcurrency config
Latch acquisition integrated into scheduler (acquire before execute, release after)
Storage methods delegate to scheduler instead of direct action calls
Callback-based async results
Unit tests pass: command dispatch, latch contention, concurrent execution
go build succeeds
go test ./internal/storage/txn/... passes

tasks.description: Implement Raft snapshot SST export/ingest and transport. Design doc: design_docs/additional_impl/01_raft_snapshot.md. Implement PeerStorage.Snapshot() with actual data, snapshot generation state machine, chunked gRPC transfer, and ApplySnapshot for ingest.
acceptance_criteria: PeerStorage.Snapshot() generates snapshot with actual region data from all CFs
SnapshotData type serializes CF data (default, lock, write) for a region key range
Snapshot generation runs asynchronously (state machine: Relax/Generating)
Chunked gRPC transfer via existing transport.SendSnapshot
ApplySnapshot: ingest received snapshot data into engine atomically
Post-apply: update ApplyState, hard state, truncated index
Unit tests pass for snapshot generation and application
go build succeeds
go test ./internal/raftstore/... passes

tasks.description: Implement Raft configuration changes (peer add/remove). Design doc: design_docs/additional_impl/04_conf_change.md. Enhance handleReady() to perform cluster-level actions, add store worker goroutine for CreatePeer/DestroyPeer, update region metadata.
acceptance_criteria: handleReady() updates region.Peers on conf change commit
Store worker goroutine handles StoreMsgTypeCreatePeer and StoreMsgTypeDestroyPeer
AddPeer: leader sends message to target store, new peer created and registered
RemovePeer: peer destroyed and unregistered from Router
Region metadata (metapb.Region) updated atomically
ChangePeerResult produced and handled
Unit tests pass for add/remove peer scenarios
go build succeeds
go test ./internal/raftstore/... passes

tasks.description: Integrate coprocessor with gRPC endpoint. Design doc: design_docs/additional_impl/10_coprocessor_rpc.md. Add Endpoint.Handle() to decode DAG requests, build executor pipeline, execute, encode response. Add tikvService.Coprocessor() handler.
acceptance_criteria: Endpoint.Handle(req) decodes DAGRequest from protobuf
Pipeline builder creates executor chain from DAG
Coprocessor gRPC handler on tikvService
Response encoded as protobuf coprocessor.Response
Key range to region mapping for request validation
Unit tests pass for request decoding and pipeline execution
go build succeeds
go test ./internal/coprocessor/... passes

tasks.description: Implement PD (Placement Driver) server. Design doc: design_docs/additional_impl/13_pd_server.md. Create standalone PD binary (cmd/gookvs-pd/) with TSO allocator, cluster metadata store (Pebble), region tree, heartbeat processing, ID allocation, bootstrap.
acceptance_criteria: cmd/gookvs-pd/main.go entry point created
PDServer struct with TSO allocator (physical<<18|logical, monotonic, crash-safe)
Pebble-backed metadata store for cluster/store/region info
RegionTree for region key-range lookup
Bootstrap RPC: first store bootstraps cluster with initial region
GetTS (TSO) allocates monotonically increasing timestamps
StoreHeartbeat and RegionHeartbeat processing
AskBatchSplit allocates IDs, ReportBatchSplit updates metadata
AllocID provides monotonic unique IDs
GetRegion, GetRegionByID, ScanRegions for region lookup
gRPC server implements pdpb.PD service
Unit tests pass for TSO, metadata store, region tree
go build ./cmd/gookvs-pd/ succeeds

tasks.description: Implement GC worker for old MVCC version cleanup. Design doc: design_docs/additional_impl/12_gc_worker.md. Create GCWorker goroutine, MVCC GC algorithm (scan CF_WRITE, delete old versions below safe point), KvGC gRPC endpoint.
acceptance_criteria: GCWorker struct with background goroutine
MVCC GC algorithm: scan CF_WRITE for keys with commitTS < safe_point
Per-key GC: keep latest version, delete older Put/Delete records and CF_DEFAULT values
GCTask defines key range and safe point for a GC run
KvGC gRPC endpoint triggers GC for key range
Rate limiting to avoid impacting read/write performance
PD client methods GetGCSafePoint/UpdateGCSafePoint added
Unit tests pass for GC algorithm and worker lifecycle
go build succeeds
go test ./internal/storage/gc/... passes

tasks.description: Wire PD client into gookvs-server: heartbeat loops, TSO usage, PD command processing. Design doc: design_docs/additional_impl/14_pd_integration.md. Create PDWorker goroutine, implement store/region heartbeat, handle PD scheduling commands.
acceptance_criteria: PD client instantiated in main.go using --pd-endpoints
PDWorker goroutine for store heartbeat (periodic, reports capacity/region count)
PeerTickPdHeartbeat handled: leader peers send region heartbeat to PD
PD scheduling commands processed (TransferLeader, ChangePeer)
TSO used for transaction timestamp allocation
Graceful degradation when PD is unreachable
Unit tests pass for PDWorker and heartbeat logic
go build succeeds
go test ./internal/... passes

tasks.description: Implement region split: size check, boundary calculation, split execution. Design doc: design_docs/additional_impl/02_region_split.md. Add SplitChecker with periodic tick, split key calculation, AdminSplit proposal through Raft, post-split peer creation.
acceptance_criteria: SplitChecker runs on PeerTickSplitRegionCheck
Region size estimation via key range iteration
Split key selection (approximate middle key)
AdminSplit proposed through Raft when region exceeds split-size
Split execution: create new region with right half of key range
Post-split: new peer created via StoreCoordinator, registered with Router
PD notified via AskBatchSplit/ReportBatchSplit
Region metadata updated (start_key, end_key, epoch)
Unit tests pass for split checker, key calculation, split execution
go build succeeds
go test ./internal/raftstore/... passes

tasks.description: Implement region merge: PrepareMerge, CommitMerge, RollbackMerge. Design doc: design_docs/additional_impl/15_region_merge.md. Two-phase merge protocol: source region proposes PrepareMerge, target region proposes CommitMerge.
acceptance_criteria: PeerTickCheckMerge handled: detects undersized regions
PrepareMerge admin command: marks source region as merging
CommitMerge admin command: target region absorbs source data
RollbackMerge: handles merge failure gracefully
Post-merge: source region destroyed, target key range expanded
Epoch-based safety prevents stale requests during merge
PD notified of merge completion
Unit tests pass for merge protocol and edge cases
go build succeeds
go test ./internal/raftstore/... passes
